subcodes.first_line: O thou who art afflicted with pain, be not grieved by the calamities that have befallen thee, the hardships that have come to pass, and the succession of tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبتلای آلام از مصائب وارده و مشقات حاصله و بلایای متوالیه محزون مباش جمال
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
